instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift when engine speed falls below the calibrated threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Engine_Speed falls below Downshift_RPM.

expected_output: IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform downshift during high throttle demand.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command downshift when throttle position exceeds Throttle_Limit.

expected_output: IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift when vehicle speed drops below the downshift limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall initiate downshift when Vehicle_Speed falls below Downshift_Speed.

expected_output: IF Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
